type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The co-located facilities HUSSAR CROWFOOT Gas Plant 14-01-024-22W4 (F0003473) and HUSSAR CROWFOOT Compressor Station 14-01-024-22W4 (F3469) were combined into one for the purpose emission inventory reporting. This resulted in the reported increase in NOx, CO, PM10 and PM2.5 emissions.
